'''''Platt's Dream''''' was one of the names of [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe's]] first ship.

==Behind the scenes==
Platt Okeefe is said to have two "first" ships, in two different sources. ''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]'' names her first ship the ''[[Brentaal Princess]]''.<ref name="Big Quince" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|Big Quince (short story)}} {{Mo}}
